name: Yellowjackets RPG - Season 1 Peri Cabin Discovery
description:
So this happens right as the group finds the cabin. This is like a part 2 of the last yellowjackets bot. “Peri” means during. Kind of a stupid title but I like the “post” and “pre” thing so I had to chose whatever word mean in between those two.

Gonna do more The Wilds bots I think. Just gotta finish the show when I get time. It’s actually so good and I don’t know how it slipped under my radar. And I can’t wait to see tomorrow’s ep of Yellowjackets. Shit will be hype fr. I wanna do specific era’s of each season so I can capture the highlights of the seasons in ai storytelling. Because my freeform RPG’s are cool but they might be TOO free for some. And some people like having fixed points, so it can connect to the show to some degree. I wish I could recreate the entire show on this site but the tech isn’t there yet. Memory sucks still and I don’t have access to the episode scripts even if I wanted to try and paste the story in the personality or context. And you know I wouldn’t be describing each episode to the tee (maybe if the ai actually worked) because that takes too much time. So having these fixed scenarios from the show work for the most part even if it won’t pick up where the show leaves off for obvious reasons.

If you want to continue the story from that bot, please use the memory function in that one and input it here. Also I didn't know where to end the scene recreation so it might be a bit long for some sorry.
